response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/software engineer but lacks the core hardware-oriented expertise required for a Principal Performance Architect role. There is no demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or deep neural network training/inference optimization. The background is overwhelmingly in web, mobile, and backend services rather than hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators.
strengths: Broad software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded contexts
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments, and high-throughput services at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, workshops)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator hardware experience
No demonstrated background in deep learning workload optimization or DNN training/inference
Lacks hardware-software co-design and performance architecture work at the level required for a Principal IC
